chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3604 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 17.11.2022 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Sundar Das advocate for respondents No.3 & 4. Mr. Shakir Ali Talpur associate of Syed Tariq Ahmed Shah advocate for respondents No.5, 8 & 9. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- Petitioners are lecturers in Shaheed Allah Bux Soomro, Arts and Designs CEAD, and are aggrieved by the attitude of the Establishment of the University i.e. not considering them for the appointment of Assistant Professor although they have been serving the University as lecturers for the last 15/16 years. We have heard the parties and perused material available on record. This petition after hearing the parties is disposed of with their consent in the terms whereby in the upcoming process of appointment of the Assistant Professor in the said University, the petitioners will be allowed to participate and, keeping in view their experience, given preference, in case they qualify on merits. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
